# jk plugin

Inspect and manage Jenkins plugins

```
jk plugin <command> [flags]
```

## Subcommands

| Subcommand | Description | Key Flags |
|---|---|---|
| [disable](#jk-plugin-disable) | Disable a plugin | — |
| [enable](#jk-plugin-enable) | Enable a plugin | — |
| [install](#jk-plugin-install) | Install plugins via the Jenkins update center | `--yes` |
| [ls](#jk-plugin-ls) | List installed plugins | — |

## jk plugin disable

Disable a plugin

### Usage

```
jk plugin disable <name> [flags]
```

### Inherited Flags

| Flag | Short | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `--context` | `-c` | Active Jenkins context name (or set JK_CONTEXT env var) |
| `--format` |  | Output format: json, yaml |
| `--jq` |  | Filter JSON output using jq expression (requires --json or --format=json) |
| `--json` |  | Output in JSON format when supported |
| `--quiet` | `-q` | Suppress non-essential output |
| `--template` | `-t` | Format output using Go template (requires --json or --format=json) |
| `--yaml` |  | Output in YAML format when supported |

## jk plugin install

Install plugins via the Jenkins update center

### Usage

```
jk plugin install <plugin[@version]> [<plugin[@version]>...] [flags]
```

### Flags

| Flag | Short | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `--yes` | `-y` | Do not prompt for confirmation |

### Inherited Flags

| Flag | Short | Description |
|---|---|---|
| `--context` | `-c` | Active Jenkins context name (or set JK_CONTEXT env var) |
| `--format` |  | Output format: json, yaml |
| `--jq` |  | Filter JSON output using jq expression (requires --json or --format=json) |
| `--json` |  | Output in JSON format when supported |
| `--quiet` | `-q` | Suppress non-essential output |
| `--template` | `-t` | Format output using Go template (requires --json or --format=json) |
| `--yaml` |  | Output in YAML format when supported |
